overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spaceship flying near a massive industrial orbital station in a pink-hued atmospheric environment. The player maneuvers around the station's structures, passing from the side of a large module labeled 'CAPLAN' toward the main station complex with the sun visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft steadily alongside the massive station module, maintaining parallel course with the hull

entered.detail: Large industrial station module with CAPLAN text visible on the hull, featuring rows of windows and structural ribs
Long central structural spine extending into the pink atmospheric haze
Tall antenna towers and communication equipment on the station structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person cockpit view flying parallel to a massive industrial space station module. The CAPLAN station structure dominates the left side of the frame with its detailed hull and windows, while the pink-hued sky fills the background. The spacecraft maintains a steady course alongside the station with no other traffic visible.

events.description: passing the end of the Caplan module, revealing the main station complex ahead
sun becomes visible on the right side, creating warm orange glare across the cockpit

agents.ego_description: banking the spacecraft to the right to navigate around the station structure and approach the main complex

entered.detail: Massive central station structure with multiple docking bays, towers, and intricate industrial architecture
Large solar collection panels extending from the station structure

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft turns right to pass the end of the Caplan module, revealing the massive main station complex ahead. The sun begins to appear on the right side, casting a warm orange glow across the scene. The station spine recedes into the left background while the main complex grows larger in the center frame.

events.description: slight descent while maintaining forward velocity toward the station surface

agents.ego_description: flying over the station surface with the sun at the right, observing the industrial structures and solar arrays below

entered.detail: Extensive solar panel structures glowing in the sunlight on the right side of the station
Additional orbital platforms and station extensions visible in the distant haze

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the spacecraft flying over the main station complex with the sun prominently visible on the right, creating a bright glare. Solar panel arrays extend from the station structure, and the industrial details of the station surface become more prominent as the camera approaches. The distant station spine fades from view as the focus shifts to the immediate station architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective that transitions from a parallel flight alongside a massive industrial module to a direct approach toward a sprawling station complex. It begins by gliding past the detailed hull and windows of the CAPLAN module against a pink-hued sky. As the spacecraft turns right to clear the end of the module, the main station complex emerges ahead while the sun appears on the right, shifting the lighting toward a warm orange glow. The scene then expands as the camera flies over the main complex, with the distant station spine fading away and the sun creating a bright glare. Finally, the focus tightens on the immediate industrial architecture and extending solar panel arrays as the spacecraft closes in on the station surface.
